label: Affine transforms & dense layers

node.label: Affine transforms & dense layers
node.definition: Learned linear maps mix features and channels and form the backbone of most neural blocks.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Affine transforms & dense layers is to connect Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Linear algebra to downstream capabilities including Nonlinear activations, Residual, skip & highway connections, Gating & multiplicative control.
examples: substrate for Residual, skip & highway connections
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Linear algebra.

dependencies.rationale: Affine transforms & dense layers uses Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Affine transforms & dense layers uses Linear algebra as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Affine transforms & dense layers uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Learned linear maps mix features and channels and form the backbone of most neural blocks.

The role of Affine transforms & dense layers is to connect Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Linear algebra to downstream capabilities including Nonlinear activations, Residual, skip & highway connections, Gating & multiplicative control.
substrate for Residual, skip & highway connections
